title: Pros and Cons of Leveraged Technology XLK ETFs: TECL vs. TECS
author: tickeron_community
selftext: Leveraged ETFs on the Technology Select Sector ([XLK](https://tickeron.com/ticker/XLK/)) offer amplified exposure to tech stocks without the need for a margin account. [TECL](https://tickeron.com/ticker/TECL/) (Direxion Daily Technology Bull 3× Shares) provides 3× long exposure, while [TECS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/TECS/) (Direxion Daily Technology Bear 3× Shares) delivers 3× inverse exposure. Below, we compare their key advantages and drawbacks to help you determine which may suit your trading strategy.
